message:
test: expand coverage with schema validation, provider contract proptests, perf budget metric checks, and session store v2 property tests

bench_schema.rs: Strengthen phase1 matrix validator to require non-empty
run_id and correlation_id at top level, and cross-check that lineage
run_id_lineage[0] == run_id and [1] == correlation_id. Add rejection tests
for empty run_id and lineage/top-level ID mismatches.

provider_contract.rs: Add context_with_tools() helper for wiring tool
definitions into Context. New proptests module with tool_seed_strategy
generating random ToolDef schemas — validates that OpenAI tool schema
round-trips through build_request preserve tool count, names, required
arrays, and parameter structure.

provider_factory.rs: Add provider_base_strategy generating URLs with varied
schemes, hosts, and path suffixes. Three proptest invariants confirming
normalize_openai_base, normalize_openai_responses_base, and
normalize_cohere_base produce correct suffixes, no trailing slashes, and
are idempotent.

perf_budgets.rs: Introduce is_positive_finite_metric() and metric_state()
helpers; upgrade E2E ratio contract validation to reject non-positive and
non-finite values (not just missing). Refactor write_stratification_artifact
into write_stratification_artifact_with_full_e2e_layer for custom layer
injection. New test required_e2e_ratio_contract_fails_when_full_e2e_values_non_positive
verifying zero and negative values trigger the contract failure.

session_store_v2.rs: Three property tests for v2 sidecar path mechanics:
- proptest_v2_sidecar_path_preserves_parent_and_stem: sidecar shares parent
  dir and uses stem.v2 naming regardless of extension.
- proptest_v2_sidecar_path_is_extension_agnostic: different extensions on
  the same stem produce identical sidecar paths.
- proptest_has_v2_sidecar_matches_manifest_or_index_invariant: detection
  returns true iff manifest.json or index/offsets.jsonl exists.

qa_docs_policy_validation.rs: Register two new claim-integrity gate check
IDs (phase1_matrix_primary_outcomes_status_valid,
phase1_matrix_cells_primary_e2e_metrics_present) in the fail-closed
condition wiring test.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
